chain_of_thought: [INCORRECT] Coin start head. Ka flip. Sherrie flip. Ka flip. 3 flip. Odd flip. Coin tail. [CORRECT] Coin start head. Ka flip. Sherrie flip. 2 flip. Even flip. Coin still head.
